mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_chunk_info (file_md5, chunk_index, chunk_md5, storage_path, user_id) VALUES (#{fileMd5}, #{chunkIndex}, #{chunkMd5}, #{storagePath}, #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT id, file_md5, chunk_index, chunk_md5, storage_path, user_id FROM kb_chunk_info WHERE file_md5 = #{fileMd5} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY chunk_index ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM kb_chunk_info WHERE file_md5 = #{fileMd5} AND user_id = #{userId}
